citations.citation: @article{Kiessling_2021, title={Advances and Limitations in Open Source Arabic-Script OCR: A Case Study}, volume={11}, ISSN={1918-3666}, url={http://dx.doi.org/10.16995/dscn.8094}, DOI={10.16995/dscn.8094}, number={1}, journal={Digital Studies / Le champ numérique}, publisher={Open Library of the Humanities}, author={Kiessling, Benjamin and Kurin, Gennady and Miller, Matthew Thomas and Smail, Kader}, year={2021}, month=Dec }
